problem id: 2f6c2b3e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00010111 -> 01110000
  11110001 -> 00010001
  00111011 -> 10110000
  10001111 -> 11110001
  01010100 -> 01000000
  00000101 -> 01010000
  01001011 -> 10110000
  00100010 -> 00100000

query: 00100000
predicted answer: 00000000
